# SplitRE

> Commission management software for independent US real estate brokerages.

SplitRE is a web application that automates commission calculations, annual cap tracking, and QuickBooks Online sync for real estate brokerages. It is built and operated by Keplify LLC, a Delaware-incorporated company.

## What SplitRE does

- Calculates agent commission splits from rule-based commission plans (percentage splits, tiered splits, flat post-cap fees, E&O and transaction fee deductions, referral deductions)
- Tracks each agent's annual gross commission income (GCI) toward their cap in real time
- Automatically flips agent splits to 100% when they cross their annual cap
- Syncs confirmed deals to QuickBooks Online as Invoices and Bills with one click
- Generates PDF agent earnings statements
- Allows per-agent commission plan overrides without affecting brokerage-wide plans
- Supports mid-year cap migration for agents who join during a cap year
- Provides shareable read-only deal breakdown links for agents and attorneys

## Who it is for

Independent US real estate brokerages, typically 1–50 agents. Suitable for boutique broker-owners replacing spreadsheets, growing independents who need a QuickBooks-connected back office, and established brokerages with multiple commission plan structures.

## Pricing

Three plans, all features included on every tier — differentiated only by active agent headcount:

- Boutique: $89/mo or $749/yr — up to 5 agents
- Independent: $189/mo or $1,599/yr — up to 25 agents
- Brokerage: $329/mo or $2,799/yr — unlimited agents

All plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.
